title: Blandowia preissii

Blandowia preissii is native to Western Australia and is often found growing in forests and woodlands. The species is a type of evergreen tree that can grow up to a certain height and is known for its large leaves and small flowers. Within the plant kingdom, Blandowia preissii is a member of the division Magnoliophyta, which consists of flowering plants.
